isin.description: International Securities Identification Number. The unique primary key for issuers in the database constraint.

name.description: Official company name, used for text similarity matching and direct queries.

symbol.description: Stock ticker or market symbol. Sometimes used as a fallback for registration numbers (e.g., ICO in Czechia).

market.description: Stock exchange or segment where the company is traded, used to route the search to the correct connector.

native_identifiers.austria_oekb_oam_id: OeKB Emittent ID (numeric identifier in OeKB public notices)
native_identifiers.austria_oekb_oam_issuer_url: Direct link to OeKB issuer page containing emittentId parameter

providers.matching_strategy_search: Filters feed notices: matches notice 'issuer_isins' with 'issuer.isin', or falls back to exact match on normalized name 'issuer.name' if no ISIN is present in the notice.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Scores notices from the public feed: ISIN match = 100%, exact Name match = 90%, substring or partial Name match = 80%. Resolves to the highest-scoring OeKB Emittent ID.

native_identifiers.belgium_fsma_record_id: STORI record ID extracted from Belgian FSMA notices

providers.matching_strategy_search: Scores notice against issuer. ISIN code match = 100%, exact name match = 85%, name substring match = 72%, name word overlap >= 60% = 60-70%, symbol match = 55%. Notice matches if score is >= 55%.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Fetches company register from FSMA, scores options using name and symbol abbreviation/localisedName, then verifies by fetching the company's notices and matching ISIN codes.

providers.matching_strategy_search: Normalizes issuer name and checks if it matches, contains, or is contained in the filing's issuer name.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Direct index syncing from Bulgarian Stock Exchange company listing pages (grouped by alphabet buckets).

native_identifiers.source_record_id: HANFA SRPI attachment or record identifier

providers.matching_strategy_search: Filters recent feed documents where normalized candidate issuer name exactly matches issuer name.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Queries categories on the HANFA registry, matching normalized notice issuer name (exact match = 100%, inclusion = 85%).

native_identifiers.ico: Czech Business Registration Number (stored in issuer.symbol / czechia_cnb_curi_record_id)
native_identifiers.lei: Legal Entity Identifier (often stored in notice.lei and matched against issuer.isin)

providers.matching_strategy_search: Matches notice if notice LEI matches issuer.isin, or notice ICO matches issuer.symbol, or issuer.name matches notice issuer name, or issuer.isin is extracted from the names of attached files.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Scores feed notices: LEI match = 100%, ICO match = 95%, exact Name match = 90%, ISIN found in notice files = 85%, partial Name match = 80%. Resolves to the registration number (ICO).

providers.matching_strategy_search: Queries the OAM search endpoint using ISIN, Name, and Symbol. Matches notices where issuer.isin is in notice.issuer_isins, or normalized name/symbol are contained in notice issuer name/title.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Executes search queries and scores notices: ISIN match = 100%, Name match = 80%, Symbol match = 60%. Resolves to Danish FSA record ID.

providers.matching_strategy_search: Filters recent feed documents where normalized candidate issuer name exactly matches issuer name.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Fetches registry notices and matches normalized issuer name vs notice issuer name (exact = 100%, inclusion = 85%).

native_identifiers.finland_oam_company_id: Finland OAM Company ID (stored in database for targeted queries)

providers.matching_strategy_search: Performs a targeted query using the resolved 'finland_oam_company_id'. Resolves it first if not present in the database.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Fetches CSRF tokens and company select dropdown lists from OAM, matches issuer name/symbol against options (exact name = 100%, name inclusion = 80%, symbol match = 60%).

providers.matching_strategy_search: Validates that issuer market is Euronext Paris, then queries the AMF OpenData API directly with query filters built using 'issuer.isin' (e.g., search("ISIN")).
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Not required, as the AMF OpenData API allows direct queries by ISIN.

providers.matching_strategy_search: Uses the company's IR or report URLs from database. If missing, prints warning with issuer name/ISIN. Crawls pages to extract links matching file extensions and keywords.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: N/A (Web crawler fallback).

providers.matching_strategy_search: Scores notices: ISIN match = 100%, exact Name = 90%, Name inclusion = 82%, Name word overlap >= 60% = 65-80%, Name SequenceMatcher >= 0.78 = 60-75.6%, exact Symbol match = 70%, Symbol word in name/headline = 55%. Matches if score is >= 55%.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Queries company notices and ranks them using the same match scoring algorithm. Resolves to the best-matching notice record ID.

providers.market: Euronext Milan, Euronext Star Milan, Euronext Growth Milan, Euronext MIV Milan

native_identifiers.borsa_italiana_company_url: Borsa Italiana company profile URL constructed using issuer.isin

providers.matching_strategy_search: Scores notice company vs issuer. Exact name match = 1.0, substring >= 5 chars = max(score, 0.94), symbol word or initials match = max(score, 0.9). Matches if score is >= 0.84.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Downloads eMarket Storage company options list and matches name and symbol against options using the search scoring logic.

providers.matching_strategy_search: Filters recent feed documents where normalized candidate issuer name exactly matches issuer name.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Fetches registry notices and matches normalized issuer name vs notice issuer name (exact = 100%, inclusion = 85%).

providers.matching_strategy_search: Filters recent feed documents where normalized candidate issuer name equals or contains/is contained in issuer name.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Matches normalized notice issuer name (exact = 100%, inclusion = 85%). If no match, scans the OAM's 'company-select' dropdown options (exact = 100%, inclusion = 85%).

native_identifiers.source_record_id: Malta MSE OAM notice record ID

providers.matching_strategy_search: Fetches notices and checks if normalized issuer name is in notice issuer name, or if issuer.symbol is contained in notice issuer name.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Matches notice issuer name vs issuer.name (exact = 100%, inclusion = 85%).

native_identifiers.afm_record_id: AFM financial reporting register record ID

providers.matching_strategy_search: Scores registry records: ISIN in record text = 1.0, exact name match = 1.0, substring >= 4 chars = max(score, 0.95), symbol >= 3 chars in record text = max(score, 0.88). Matches if score is >= 0.84.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Filters and ranks all AFM register records using the search scoring logic.

native_identifiers.oslo_issuer_id: Euronext Oslo issuer ID (extracted from listview URLs)

providers.matching_strategy_search: Matches if notice company equals issuer name, notice company equals symbol, symbol in parentheses in title, or SequenceMatcher ratio >= 0.9 on clean names. Then checks that detail ISIN matches issuer ISIN.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Queries Euronext instruments using name/symbol, ranks results, parses heading on instrument product page, and extracts Euronext press release issuer ID or fallback ISIN.

providers.matching_strategy_search: Sends POST query with issuer name to field 'NazwaPodmiot'. Filters notices where normalized notice issuer name exactly matches issuer name.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Queries KNF OAM using issuer name, scores results (exact name = 90.0, inclusion = 80.0).

native_identifiers.portugal_cmvm_record_id: Portuguese CMVM SDI notice record ID

providers.matching_strategy_search: Matches if notice isin_codes contains issuer.isin, or normalized name equals/inclusion/SequenceMatcher ratio >= 0.82, or symbol >= 3 chars is a word in notice name or title.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Compares notice names using SequenceMatcher * 100 (boosted to 90.0 if search match passes). Resolves to CMVM SDI record ID if score is >= 75.0.

native_identifiers.source_record_id: Romania ASF OAM notice record ID

providers.matching_strategy_search: Fetches notices and matches if issuer.isin equals notice ISIN, or normalized issuer.name equals/inclusion matches notice issuer name.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Scores notices: ISIN or exact name match = 100.0, Name inclusion = 85.0. Resolves to ASF OAM record ID.

providers.matching_strategy_search: Queries registry list using first part of issuer's name (pre-comma split).
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Fetches listing, matches normalized notice issuer name (exact = 100.0, inclusion = 85.0).

providers.matching_strategy_search: Filters recent feed documents where normalized candidate issuer name exactly matches issuer name.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: Fetches listing, matches normalized notice issuer name (exact = 100.0, inclusion = 85.0).

providers.market: Bolsa de Madrid, Bolsa de Barcelona, Bolsa de Bilbao, Bolsa de Valencia, BME Growth, BME Scaleup

native_identifiers.spain_cnmv_nif: Spanish NIF (fiscal number starting with A/B/etc. used for direct entity searches)

providers.matching_strategy_search: Queries CNMV by entity name and filters results using the Spanish NIF. Inserts issuer.isin into document metadata if found.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: POSTs name to search form, resolves CNIF (NIF) from select list options or results table, enriches with BME company URL using ticker symbol.

providers.matching_strategy_search: Queries the Swedish FI documents list by name and filters the returned items by ISIN.
providers.matching_strategy_resolution: POSTs the ISIN or name to Sweden FI Search.aspx. Resolves to the first match and enriches with Nasdaq company URL using symbol/isin.
